usage_rules: Use no cue when the scene works better with only Grok video audio.
Prefer one short impact cue at the funniest visual reveal or punchline.
Longer stingers can start near the beginning for a full-scene meme mood.
Keep cue timing creative; do not force fixed second ranges.

cues.best_for: anime gasp, tiny panic, dramatic surprise
big reveal, impressed crowd, magical discovery
painful bump, startled grunt, slapstick hit
dead silence, failed joke, social embarrassment
banana peel slip, fast stumble, tiny pratfall
confused stare, silly misread, brain freeze
